mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId, MENU_ID AS menuId, AUTH_CODE AS authCode FROM FWK_ROLE_MENU WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_ROLE_MENU (ROLE_ID, MENU_ID, AUTH_CODE) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{menuId}, #{authCode})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_ROLE_MENU WHERE ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.MENU_ID, A.MENU_NAME, NVL((SELECT 'N' FROM FWK_MENU B WHERE A.MENU_ID = B.PRIOR_MENU_ID AND ROWNUM = 1), 'Y') AS LEAF_YN, SUBSTR(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.MENU_NAME, ' > '), 4) AS MENU_PATH, A.MENU_URL, CASE WHEN RM.AUTH_CODE IN ('R', 'W') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HAS_READ, CASE WHEN RM.AUTH_CODE = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HAS_WRITE FROM FWK_MENU A LEFT JOIN FWK_ROLE_MENU RM ON A.MENU_ID = RM.MENU_ID AND RM.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (A.MENU_URL IS NULL OR A.MENU_URL NOT IN ('NaN', 'NAN')) START WITH A.PRIOR_MENU_ID = '*' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.MENU_ID = A.PRIOR_MENU_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.SORT_ORDER
